calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:16am
Judge David Porter, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Kelly Capital Investments appears through counsel Michael K. Marks. Respondent San Francisco Advertiser appears through Jennifer Wing Julian with Robert Hutchinson. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Porter.

10:05am
Matter is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Continued To Dec-17-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
